content.text: Directions: Talk about the following topic. You will have 60 seconds to prepare and 90 seconds to speak.
Part 3. Directions: Talk about the following topic. You will have 60 seconds to prepare and 90 seconds to speak.

gradingInfo.problemInfo:
## Free Talk

Listen to the student's talk about the following topic.

**Topic:** {{free_talk_topic}}

Evaluate based on the speaking ability demonstrated in the recording.
gradingInfo.gradingInfo:
### Scoring Rubric

| Score | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| 10 | **Outstanding** - Well-organized, rich content, fluent, excellent vocabulary |
| 8 | **Good** - Organized, sufficient content, mostly fluent |
| 6 | **Average** - Basic organization, adequate content, some hesitation |
| 4 | **Below Average** - Poor organization, limited content, frequent hesitation |
| 2 | **Poor** - Very brief, lacks coherence |

### Key Points

- Relevance to the topic
- Organization and coherence
- Vocabulary range
- Fluency and pronunciation
- Use of complex sentences

editableData.description: 自由口语话题（支持多行）
